name: dhpk
description: Reusable Claude Code harness — 18 role-based agents (incl. the Swift/Xcode build-resolver and the silent-failure-hunter error-handling auditor) + ~70 commands + opt-in stack modules across PHP (5.6, 7.4, 8.x), Yii (1.1), PHPUnit (5.7, 9, 10, 11), Laravel (5.4, 6–11), JS, Vue 2, Laravel Mix 5, the library-author cross-cutting module, and an iOS/Swift suite (swift, swiftui, ios-platform, swift-testing, xcode-tooling) with SwiftLint post-edit + xcodebuild/SPM pre-commit hooks, a Swift 6.2 approachable-concurrency reference, and an ios-icon-gen skill. 6-slot sentinel-driven review hooks (code / db / sec / frontend / doc / polyfill — polyfill via library-author), parameterised docker/agent names, wrapper-dispatch hook extension model, parallel Codex CLI tree.

hook_profile.title: Hook profile
hook_profile.description: Verbosity of hook output: minimal | standard | strict

review_agents.title: Review agent names
review_agents.description: Five agents invoked by sentinel reminders (code, database, security, frontend, doc). Override to point at project-specific agents. Pad the list with empty strings or drop trailing slots to reduce coverage.

docker_containers.title: Docker containers
docker_containers.description: Container names checked at SessionStart. Empty list disables the check.

modules.title: Stack modules to enable
modules.description: Enable stack modules from modules/. Ships: php-5.6, php-7.4, php-8.x, yii-1.1, phpunit-5.7, phpunit-9, phpunit-10, phpunit-11, laravel-5.4, laravel-6, laravel-7, laravel-8, laravel-9, laravel-10, laravel-11, js, vue-2, laravel-mix, library-author, swift, swiftui, ios-platform, swift-testing, xcode-tooling. Module 'requires' validated at SessionStart (warning only). Stack selection is additive for php / laravel / phpunit — library packages spanning versions should enable each version in their composer constraint to get cumulative guidance. Enabling 'js' wires the ESLint post-edit hook + pre-commit lint/typecheck gate; enabling 'php-7.4' wires the php-cs-fixer post-edit hook + pre-commit lint+phpstan+psalm gate; enabling 'library-author' wires the sixth-color `polyfill-reviewer` sentinel for multi-major PHP libraries spanning Laravel 6-11 / Monolog 2-3 / PHPUnit 8-11 / Flysystem 1-3 (see modules/library-author/module.yaml for guard_patterns / skip_paths config). iOS suite: enabling 'xcode-tooling' wires the SwiftLint post-edit hook + pre-commit xcodebuild/SPM build+test gate (both self-skip when swiftlint/xcodebuild are absent); swift / swiftui / ios-platform / swift-testing are skills+references only (no hooks). The iOS suite is dependency-chained — swiftui / ios-platform / swift-testing / xcode-tooling each `requires: swift`. Precedence: a project's .claude/settings.local.json (or settings.json) `pluginConfigs.dhpk@dhpk.options.modules` OVERRIDES the global value — supports a single dev machine working on projects with different stacks.

review_trigger_extra_paths.title: Extra review trigger paths
review_trigger_extra_paths.description: Extra path prefixes per reviewer slot, formatted '<slot>:<prefix>' where slot ∈ code|db|sec|fe|doc. Example: 'code:protected/', 'fe:resources/views/'

hot_tables.title: High-volume table names
hot_tables.description: Project-specific high-volume / hot table names that performance-analyzer and migration-reviewer treat as elevated risk (large-ALTER downtime, N+1, missing composite index). The agents ship POS-system examples only; declare your project's real hot tables here (or in CLAUDE.md / .claude/rules/). Example: 'orders', 'order_lines', 'inventory'. Default empty = rely on the agents' generic heuristics + CLAUDE.md.

js_lint_script.title: JS lint npm script name
js_lint_script.description: npm script invoked by modules/js/hooks/pre-commit-js-validation.sh. Default 'lint'. Override when the project uses a non-standard script name (e.g. 'lint:strict').

js_check_path.title: JS @ts-check scan path
js_check_path.description: Path scanned by the /ts-check-status command. Default 'js/'. Override for projects laying out JS under e.g. 'src/' or 'app/javascript/'.

swiftlint_bin.title: SwiftLint binary path
swiftlint_bin.description: Binary invoked by modules/xcode-tooling/hooks/post-edit-swiftlint.sh. Default 'swiftlint' (resolved on PATH). Override for a non-standard location or a wrapper. The hook self-skips when the binary is absent.

xcode_scheme.title: Xcode scheme
xcode_scheme.description: Scheme used by modules/xcode-tooling/hooks/pre-commit-swift-build.sh for `xcodebuild build`/`test`. Default empty — when empty and an Xcode project is present, the build gate is skipped (no scheme guessing). Set to the app scheme (e.g. 'babylon') to enable the gate.

xcode_destination.title: Xcode test destination
xcode_destination.description: `-destination` for the *test* step of the pre-commit gate (modules/xcode-tooling/hooks/pre-commit-swift-build.sh). The *build* step always uses a device-name-free `generic/platform=iOS Simulator`, so it never goes stale. Default empty — the test step then auto-picks the first available iOS simulator, so a stale named default never breaks the gate. Set e.g. 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17' to pin a specific simulator (must be installed — see `xcrun simctl list devices available`).

swift_build_skip_tests.title: Skip tests in the Swift pre-commit gate
swift_build_skip_tests.description: When true, modules/xcode-tooling/hooks/pre-commit-swift-build.sh runs build only (no `xcodebuild test` / `swift test`). Default false (build + test).

php_cs_fixer_bin.title: php-cs-fixer binary path
php_cs_fixer_bin.description: Binary invoked by modules/php-7.4/hooks/{post-edit-php-cs-fixer.sh,pre-commit-php-validation.sh}. Default 'vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer'. Override for non-standard locations (global install, docker exec wrapper, monorepo shared bin).

phpstan_bin.title: phpstan binary path
phpstan_bin.description: Binary invoked by modules/php-7.4/hooks/pre-commit-php-validation.sh when phpstan.neon[.dist] is present. Default 'vendor/bin/phpstan'.

psalm_bin.title: psalm binary path
psalm_bin.description: Binary invoked by modules/php-7.4/hooks/pre-commit-php-validation.sh when psalm.xml[.dist] is present. Default 'vendor/bin/psalm'.

reap_stale_mcp_processes.title: Reap stale gitnexus MCP processes
reap_stale_mcp_processes.description: When enabled, SessionStart kills ORPHANED gitnexus mcp processes (parent session dead / reparented to init). Processes owned by a live parallel session in the same repo are never killed. Off by default — only useful for projects that use the gitnexus MCP server.

sentinel_commit_gate.title: Sentinel commit gate mode
sentinel_commit_gate.description: Behaviour when `git commit/merge/rebase/cherry-pick` runs while reviewer sentinels are pending: warn (stderr reminder, exit 0) | block (reject the tool call, exit 2) | off (silent). Default 'warn'. Env DHPK_SENTINEL_COMMIT_GATE overrides this for one-shot toggles. Companion to pre-bash-guard's git-push hard block.

branch_safety.title: Protected branch safety mode
branch_safety.description: Behaviour when a history-mutating git verb (commit/merge/rebase/cherry-pick/reset/push) runs on a protected branch: warn | block | off. Default 'warn'. Env DHPK_BRANCH_SAFETY overrides for one-shot toggles.

protected_branches.title: Protected branch names / globs
protected_branches.description: Branches treated as protected by the branch_safety gate. Glob syntax supported via bash case-match (e.g. 'release/*'). Default: main, master, develop, release/*, hotfix/*. Set to empty list to disable per-branch gating without setting branch_safety=off.

skill_hint_enabled.title: Enable UserPromptSubmit skill hint
skill_hint_enabled.description: When true (default), the userpromptsubmit-skill-hint hook prints a one-line suggestion mapping the user prompt to the most likely dhpk command (e.g. 'bug' → /dhpk:bug-fix). Set false to silence. Env DHPK_DISABLE_SKILL_HINT=1 overrides for one-shot disable.

learning_db_enabled.title: Enable cross-session learning DB
learning_db_enabled.description: When true, hooks append signals (reviewer pass via clear-sentinel, subagent failure, abnormal stop) to an append-only .claude/artifacts/learning.jsonl, and SessionStart surfaces the top recurring signatures as a [learned-context] block (capped at 5 lines). Confidence is derived per signature with recency decay; the log self-rotates past 50MB. Default false (opt-in) — zero behaviour change until a project turns it on. Env DHPK_LEARNING_DB=1/0 overrides for one-shot toggles.

graduation_scan_enabled.title: Enable knowledge graduation scan
graduation_scan_enabled.description: When true, a Stop hook scans the session transcript for cited auto-memory entries (~/.claude/projects/<slug>/memory/<entry>.md), maintains cross-session counts + confidence in .claude/artifacts/memory-usage-counts.json, and regenerates .claude/artifacts/graduation-candidates.md (bootstrapped from the plugin template on first run). Entries cited ≥3 times across ≥24h/≥3 dates without trap re-occurrence are proposed for promotion to a rule/skill; in OpsX projects, high-confidence entries also auto-draft a change skeleton. Requires python3. Default false (opt-in). Env DHPK_GRADUATION_SCAN=1/0 overrides for one-shot toggles.
